summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 10 - Image Upload in Edit Form. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly via Playwright UI testing.
passed_tests: Image upload endpoint requires authentication (returns 403 without auth)
Image upload success - POST /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{index}/images works with JPEG
Image count updates after upload - jewellery item images array updated
Image delete success - DELETE /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{index}/images/{imageId} works
Invalid file type rejected - non-image files return 400
Invalid jewellery index rejected - out of bounds index returns 400
Account with close history returns close_history array
Account with reopen history returns reopen_history array
Jewellery items include images array in API response
UI: New Account form shows 'Images can be uploaded after saving' note
UI: New Account form does NOT show Images button
UI: Edit Account form shows Images button with count (0/5)
UI: Edit Account form image modal opens with upload buttons
UI: Edit Account form image modal has 'Choose from Device' button
UI: Edit Account form image modal has 'Camera' button
UI: Account Detail page Jewellery tab shows Images column with view button
UI: Account Detail page image viewer modal works with upload buttons
UI: History tab shows close/reopen events in chronological timeline
UI: History tab shows 'Account Closed' badge with date, by, remarks, pending amounts
UI: History tab shows 'Account Reopened' badge with date, by, reason

edit_form_images_button.details: Edit form jewellery section shows 'Images' button with count (0/5) for each jewellery item. Button has data-testid='jewellery-images-{index}'.

new_form_no_images_button.details: New Account form does NOT show Images button. Shows 'Images can be uploaded after saving the account.' note instead.

edit_form_image_modal.details: Clicking Images button in edit form opens modal with title 'Images - {item_name}'. Shows upload buttons: 'Choose from Device' (data-testid='form-upload-device-btn') and 'Camera' (data-testid='form-upload-camera-btn').

image_upload_api.details: POST /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{index}/images works. Returns image record with id, storage_path, original_filename, content_type, size, uploaded_at, uploaded_by.

image_delete_api.details: DELETE /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{index}/images/{imageId} works. Returns 'Image deleted successfully' message.

account_detail_jewellery_tab.details: Jewellery tab shows table with Images column. View button shows count (0/5) and opens image viewer modal with upload functionality.

history_tab.details: History tab shows close_history and reopen_history events in chronological timeline. Events display date, by, remarks/reason, pending amounts.

critical_code_review_comments: Image upload in edit form works with proper modal and upload buttons
New form correctly shows note instead of Images button
Account detail page jewellery tab maintains existing image viewing functionality
History tab displays close/reopen events correctly
Backend APIs for image upload/delete work correctly with proper validation
seed_data_creation: Backend tests use existing accounts for testing. Test account ACC000045 (id: 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72) has close/reopen history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified working. Test credentials: admin/admin123. Image upload endpoint: POST /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{item_index}/images. Image delete endpoint: DELETE /api/accounts/{id}/jewellery/{item_index}/images/{imageId}. Account with history: 69bed77c5b33dabe3fd5ef72 has 3 history events (1 close, 2 reopen). Edit form image modal uses data-testid='form-upload-device-btn' and 'form-upload-camera-btn'. Detail page uses data-testid='upload-from-device-btn' and 'upload-from-camera-btn'.
